title: Chlamysporum scabrum
uses: Chlamysporum scabrum is known to have various medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It is also used to treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant's leaves and roots are often made into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes. Additionally, Chlamysporum scabrum is believed to have antibacterial properties, which can aid in the treatment of infections.
